case_title: AGUILERA, ANTONIO VS GUILLEN, MARTIN GUSTAVO C.

docket_entries.description: PLTF DECLARATION FOR ADDRESS CHANGE, FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AGUILERA, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN, MARTIN GUSTAVO C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 11/28 /01 AT 3:30PM,PAID $10 M.O; FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN, MARTIN GUSTAVO C.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO INSTITUTO FAMILIAR DE LA RAZA RETURNED SIGNED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN, MARTIN GUSTAVO C.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-10-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-11-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-11-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-07-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 2/7/02, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILERA, ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUILLEN, MARTIN GUSTAVO C. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,027.00, DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN, MARTIN GUSTAVO C.
